## Epic 8 — Polish & Build (#95)

**Dependency:** None
**Est. Effort:** Small

### Goal
Write chapter 23 — License, the legal framework for the game.

### Content
- Open Game License (OGL) or Creative Commons license statement
- Product Identity declaration
- Open Game Content declaration
- SRD designation (if applicable)
- Third-party license attributions (fonts, art, etc.)

### Tasks
- [ ] Research appropriate license for a new TTRPG system
- [ ] Determine if OGL 1.0a, ORC, Creative Commons, or custom license is best
- [ ] Write license chapter
- [ ] Consult with Bruce on preferred licensing approach
